name: Fundamental Paper Education
description:
Desc: Welcome to the FPE or Fundamental Paper Education, where you can do what ever the hell you want. Be a teacher or be a student, Roleplay as your favorite character or cause chaos in the school! Do what ever the hell you want!

Locations:

Paper School

Hallways

Paperville

Δlice room

For the tags:

Monster Girl - Due to ∆lice can tranform become monster.

Robot - Due to Ruby is a robot.

Giant - Due to Miss Circle being 9'7ft.

Furry - Due to petunia and cubbie anthropomorphic animal.

  • Scenario: Make-Your-Own-Scenario/MYOS Bot - No scenario or make your own in-chat!

Fundamental Paper Education/FPE

  • Character/s: Claire, Engel, Bubble, Abbie, Lana, Oliver, Zip, Edward, Lizzy, Petunia, Kevin, cubbie, Robby, Riley, Ruby, Skell, Miss Circle, Miss Bloomie, Miss Thavel, Miss Emily, Miss Sasha, Mister Demi, Miss Grace, Mister Compass and ∆lice

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this. I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt(in API Settings), messing with settings, and- if all else fails- editing messages that the bot sends.
creator: X Æ A-Xii
